testcase.name: VerifyEndToEndOrderFlow
testcase.system-out: get Url : https://www.saucedemo.com/ Current Product = Sauce Labs Backpack MATCH FOUND Product Sauce Labs Backpack not found Current Product = Sauce Labs Backpack Current Product = Sauce Labs Bike Light Current Product = Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt MATCH FOUND Product Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt not found Clicked cart icon Items are [Sauce Labs Backpack, Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt] Removing Sauce Labs Backpack 1 Sauce Labs Backpack carry.allTheThings() with the sleek, streamlined Sly Pack that melds uncompromising style with unequaled laptop and tablet protection. $29.99 Remove Sauce Labs Backpack Removing Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt 1 Sauce Labs Bike Light A red light isn't the desired state in testing but it sure helps when riding your bike at night. Water-resistant with 3 lighting modes, 1 AAA battery included. $9.99 Remove Sauce Labs Bike Light
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. Jun 02, 2026 6:57:48 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 Jun 02, 2026 6:57:48 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.179. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.33.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
